description.zh: v2-vision 09 §2.1/4 · 非专业作者的 in-app 编辑器入口。Phase D6 (4/4) placeholder · 真实 React panel 在后续 sprint 落地(file-tree 左,Monaco 右,保存自动 reload)。当前手写路径走 SettingsPanel · Fork & 录制 + meta:author-plugin skill。
description.en: Non-expert authoring workbench (09 §2.1/4). D6 (4/4) placeholder; the real panel (file tree + Monaco editor, save → auto-reload) lands in a follow-up sprint. Today the working flows are SettingsPanel · Fork + meta:author-plugin skill.
